tree.setup: The university cafeteria, lunch hour. Xiao Yan is organizing a study group for the upcoming Chinese exam. She has a spreadsheet on her laptop, color-coded by subject area, and is recruiting members with the energy of a startup founder pitching to investors. She has already assigned roles to people who haven't agreed yet.
tree.setup_zh: 大学食堂，午饭时间。小燕在组织中文考试的学习小组。她的笔记本电脑上有一个按科目用颜色分类的表格，招人的劲头像创业者路演。她已经给还没答应的人分好了任务。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 嘿！你要不要加入我们的学习小组？星期二和星期四在图书馆。
turns.text_pinyin: hēi! nǐ yào bu yào jiārù wǒmen de xuéxí xiǎozǔ? xīngqī èr hé xīngqīsì zài túshūguǎn.
turns.text_en: Hey! Want to join our study group? Tuesdays and Thursdays at the library.

options.feedback: Xiao Yan pulls up her spreadsheet triumphantly.「语法、生词、还有听力。每次两个小时。」你们学什么 shows interest while gathering information.

options.text_zh: 几个人？我不太喜欢人多的小组。
options.text_pinyin: jǐ gè rén? wǒ bú tài xǐhuan rén duō de xiǎozǔ.
options.text_en: How many people? I don't really like big groups.
options.feedback: 「现在四个人，加上你五个。不多！」Xiao Yan assures you the group is 'intimate.' She defines intimate as 'fewer than twelve.' 不太喜欢 is a polite way to express a preference.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ xiǎngxiang... wǒ xīngqī èr yǒu kè.
options.text_en: Let me think... I have class on Tuesday.
options.feedback: Xiao Yan is already adjusting her spreadsheet.「那你星期四来？」She adapts. She always adapts. 有课 means 'to have class.'

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 太好了！你可以负责准备生词表。我发给你。
turns.text_pinyin: tài hǎo le! nǐ kěyǐ fùzé zhǔnbèi shēngcí biǎo. wǒ fā gěi nǐ.
turns.text_en: Great! You can be in charge of preparing the vocabulary list. I'll send it to you.

options.feedback: Xiao Yan adds your name to the spreadsheet in green (green means 'confirmed'). You've been recruited. 没问题 is the most reliable way to accept a task.

options.text_zh: 等一下，我还没说我要加入……
options.text_pinyin: děng yíxià, wǒ hái méi shuō wǒ yào jiārù...
options.text_en: Wait, I haven't said I'm joining yet...
options.feedback: Xiao Yan blinks. In her mind, you joined the moment you said 好啊. She recalibrates.「那你再想想？」还没 + verb means 'haven't yet.'

options.text_zh: 我做别的可以吗？比如找教室。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ zuò bié de kěyǐ ma? bǐrú zhǎo jiàoshì.
options.text_en: Can I do something else? Like finding a classroom.
options.feedback: Xiao Yan adjusts the spreadsheet without complaint -- she respects someone who knows their strengths.「也行！」比如 means 'for example.'

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 太好了！我把微信群的链接发给你。星期四见！
turns.text_pinyin: tài hǎo le! wǒ bǎ wēixìn qún de liànjiē fā gěi nǐ. xīngqīsì jiàn!
turns.text_en: Great! I'll send you the WeChat group link. See you Thursday!

tree.cultural_note: Study groups in Chinese universities are often organized via WeChat (微信) groups. One person usually takes the lead. Group study is culturally valued -- the idea is that everyone learns better together.
